en: She... He's a bit annoying, actually. What is that? What?
That thing that you're doing. It's like you disappear. What? What are you not telling me?
Nothing. Tell me what's going on underneath there. Nothing. Tell me.
Come on. No. Tell me. Nothing.
Ah! What are you doing? Nothing. No, stop being so churchy.
I'm not being churchy. I'm just trying to get to know you. Well, I don't want that. I'm not being churchy.
I'm just trying to get to know you.
